---
title: "Manuscript figures (dataset 2)"
author: "SK"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::robobook:
    highlight: kate
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
.libPaths(new = "/mnt/nfs/simo/rpack_4_4/")
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(reshape2)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(cellmig)
dir.create("manuscript_dataset_2")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```


```{r}
# constants
ds <- c("0.5", "1", "2.5", "5", "10", "40", "DMSO")
cs <- read.csv(file = "data/Pimozide/names.csv")$treatment_new

# load data
d <- get(load("data/dataset_2.RData"))
d$dose <- factor(x = d$dose, levels = ds)
d$treatment_new <- factor(x = d$treatment_new, levels = cs)
```


```{r, fig.width=16, fig.height=20}
ggplot(data = d)+
  facet_grid(compound~plate, scales = "free_x")+
  geom_sina(aes(x = as.factor(dose), fill = as.factor(dose), y = v, group = well), 
            shape = 21, col = "white", stroke = 0.1, size = 1)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        strip.text.x = element_text(margin = margin(0.05,0,0.05,0, "cm")),
        strip.text.y = element_text(margin = margin(0.05,0,0.05,0, "cm")))+
  xlab(label = "dose")+
  ylab(label = "migration speed (v)")+
  scale_fill_discrete(name = "dose")+
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, override.aes = list(size = 3)))
```

# `cellmig` results

```{r}
o <- get(load("results/cellmig_dataset_2.RData"))
```


# Figure 2

```{r, fig.width=6.5, fig.height=3.5}
q <- o$posteriors$delta_t
q$dose <- factor(x = q$dose, levels = ds)
q$compound <- factor(x = q$compound, levels = cs)
q$hit <- T
q$hit[which(!(q$X2.5.<=0&q$X97.5.>=0))] <- F
g1 <- ggplot(data = q)+
    facet_wrap(~compound, nrow = 3, scale = "free_x")+
    geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed")+
    geom_point(aes(x = dose, y = exp(mean), col = hit))+
    geom_errorbar(aes(x = dose, y = exp(mean), ymin = exp(X2.5.), 
                      ymax = exp(X97.5.), col = hit), width = 0.13)+
    theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
    theme(legend.position = "top")+
    theme(strip.text.x = element_text(margin = margin(0.035,0,0.035,0, "cm")))+
    ylab(label = expression("Overall fold-change ("*delta^"\'"*")"))+
    xlab(label = "Dose")+
  scale_color_manual(name = expression("95% HDIs of "* delta^"\'" *"cross 0"), 
                     values = c("TRUE"="black", "FALSE"="red"))

g1
```

```{r}
ggsave(filename = "manuscript_dataset_2/Figure_7.pdf",
       plot = g1,
       device = "pdf",
       width = 6.2,
       height = 7)
```


```{r}
q <- o$posteriors$delta_t
q$mean <- exp(q$mean)
q$L95 <- exp(q$X2.5.)
q$H95 <- exp(q$X97.5.)
q <- q[,c("mean","L95", "H95", "compound", "dose")]
q$dose_num <- as.numeric(as.character(q$dose))
q <- q[order(q$dose_num, decreasing = F), ]
q <- q[,c("mean","L95", "H95", "compound", "dose")]
stargazer::stargazer(rownames = F, summary = F, q[q$compound == "Pimozide",])
```


```{r}
q <- o$posteriors$delta_t
q$mean <- exp(q$mean)
q$L95 <- exp(q$X2.5.)
q$H95 <- exp(q$X97.5.)
q <- q[,c("mean","L95", "H95", "compound", "dose")]
q$dose_num <- as.numeric(as.character(q$dose))
q <- q[order(q$dose_num, decreasing = F), ]
q <- q[,c("mean","L95", "H95", "compound", "dose")]
stargazer::stargazer(rownames = F, summary = F, q)
```





```{r, fig.width=6.5, fig.height=7}
d_t <- o$posteriors$delta_t
d_t$dose <- factor(x = d_t$dose, levels = ds)
d_t$compound <- factor(x = d_t$compound, levels = cs)
d_t$hit <- T
d_t$hit[which(!(d_t$X2.5.<=0&d_t$X97.5.>=0))] <- F

d_tp <- o$posteriors$delta_tp
d_tp$dose <- factor(x = d_tp$dose, levels = ds)
d_tp$compound <- factor(x = d_tp$compound, levels = cs)

g1 <- ggplot()+
  facet_wrap(~compound, nrow = 3, scale = "free_x")+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed")+
  geom_errorbar(data = d_tp, aes(x = dose, y = exp(mean), ymin = exp(X2.5.), 
                                 ymax = exp(X97.5.), group = plate), width = 0.15,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), alpha = 0.85, col = "darkgray")+
  geom_point(data = d_tp, aes(x = dose, y = exp(mean), group = plate),
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.75), size = 0.5, alpha = 0.85, shape = 21, fill = "darkgray", col = "darkgray")+
  geom_errorbar(data = d_t, aes(x = dose, y = exp(mean), ymin = exp(X2.5.), 
                                ymax = exp(X97.5.), col = hit), width = 0.2)+
  geom_point(data = d_t, aes(x = dose, y = exp(mean), col = hit), size = 1)+
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
  theme(legend.position = "top")+
  theme(strip.text.x = element_text(margin = margin(0.035,0,0.035,0, "cm")))+
  ylab(label = expression("Overall ("*delta^"\'"*") and plate-specific ("*gamma^"\'"*") fold-change"))+
  xlab(label = "Dose")+
  scale_color_manual(name = expression("95% HDIs of "* delta^"\'" *"cross 0"), 
                     values = c("TRUE"="black", "FALSE"="red"))+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6))

g1
```




```{r}
ggsave(filename = "manuscript_dataset_2/Figure_7a.pdf",
       plot = g1,
       device = "pdf",
       width = 6.5,
       height = 7)
```
